title: Why cant i watch those last 2 minutes
display_title: Why cant i watch those last 2 minutes
wikitext:
[]: Why cant i watch those last 2 minutes!!             Quote Post by Nightwing » Fri Oct 18, 2013 12:29 am As any Eva fan knows End of Evangelion featured the heavily detailed "death" of Eva unit 02.Many people saw it and had much to say about it. I however,have seen the battle leading up to it, the end result but i just cant watch the final 2 MINUTES of the fight. Im Soryu (HA!) I just freeze up and cant do it, but it seems to be really good. Anyone have any advice, or stories to help me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Oct 18, 2013 1:00 am With the official DVD release being well out of print, and hence seriously pricy, you may have to resort to finding the fansub by Zhentarim DivX of the Japanese renewal release, and get it in the best available video quality.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 18, 2013 3:00 am To stay more strictly legal, you can find the renewal video on Italian CDs of EoE at a perfectly sensible price (it's been released in France now as well). Rip this and add in subs from your preferred source (or even the dub, as I've done) and you're away.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Oct 18, 2013 3:29 am You could just do what I do and torrent it (although that's kind of illegal). Although I also get the feeling that he's saying that he can't bring himself to watch those two minutes, it's not a technical issue or anything...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Oct 18, 2013 3:34 am huh? I read that as the OP saying he can't bring himself to watch it, not something about not having the film available.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 18, 2013 7:55 am NemZ wrote: huh? I read that as the OP saying he can't bring himself to watch it, not something about not having the film available.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 18, 2013 8:37 am Heh! I admit I was just responding in isolation to Mr Tines's (implied) suggestion of downloading without referring back to the OP.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightwing » Fri Oct 18, 2013 8:53 am Why are we talking about dvds i`m talking about watching eva unit 2 get ripped apart

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Oct 18, 2013 9:01 am Well, there's no real way to get through it easily.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Oct 18, 2013 11:05 am ...It's just really a place where the script decides to be a biatch. The worst thing probably was that there was this interview with Miyamura right after the release of "Death and Rebirth". "I'm hoping for Asuka to finally get her happy ending! ~~" ...cue Asuka being massacred in the worst possible way of the first few minutes of new footage. Just after she finally overcame her sorry state and met her mommy, too. Asuka just never gets a break - There she seemed to be on the way to becomming a better human being in 2.0, cue Bardiel swallowing her up and a near apocalypse (caused by none other than her best friend, to boot!) kills nearly everyone she knows...

[]:             Quote Post by Nightwing » Fri Oct 18, 2013 11:43 am So theres just no way to get past it at all?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 18, 2013 11:47 am Nightwing wrote: So theres just no way to get past it at all?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 18, 2013 1:12 pm Nightwing wrote: So theres just no way to get past it at all?

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Fri Oct 18, 2013 6:39 pm Well its a gruesome scene. But the ending may lessen some of its effects.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightwing » Fri Oct 18, 2013 11:00 pm Yeah about that i never watched EoE full on Shinji`s little visit to Asuka (which im pretty sure was monitored the whole time) pretty much made me flick through the movie until i reached asukas battle scene after seeing Rei lose her arm and the Harpies surround Unit 2 I jumped ship and started to watch Dbz

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Oct 19, 2013 12:10 am So uhh.. you haven't scene the final scene of EoE? You should watch "those final two minutes" and then watch EoE then. As an Asuka fan, trust me, things turn out (relatively) ok.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Sat Oct 19, 2013 1:12 am Nightwing wrote: Yeah about that i never watched EoE full on Shinji`s little visit to Asuka (which im pretty sure was monitored the whole time) pretty much made me flick through the movie until i reached asukas battle scene after seeing Rei lose her arm and the Harpies surround Unit 2 I jumped ship and started to watch Dbz

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 19, 2013 11:35 am NemZ wrote: huh? I read that as the OP saying he can't bring himself to watch it, not something about not having the film available.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Oct 19, 2013 12:34 pm Sorry to say this, Nightwing, but you have to sit through 100% of EoE. I've seen that scene and the entire film itself more than once, and I was able to sit through the disturbing imagery. Now be a brave user, and get this over with! ... though, I can't blame you on witnessing the torture that lies within EoE. We went from weekly Mecha fights and fanservice to an emotional/psychological roller-coaster of a lifetime. ... This is one of those reasons as to why I love this franchise!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 19, 2013 4:34 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Personally, I think there's worse later on.
